<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Delete an employee bank account"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"delete"}
  path={"/v1/employees/{employee_id}/bank_accounts/{bank_account_uuid}"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Deletes an employee bank account. To update an employee's bank
account details, delete the bank account first and create a new one.

scope: `employee_payment_methods:write`

  id={"request"}
  as={"h2"}
